Ale of The God-King.name: Ale of The God-King
Ale of The God-King.description:
Empower your |cffffffffHonored Ancestor|r's melee attacks to deal additional Frost damage scaling with your attack power. Lasts for 20 sec.

This ability consumes |cffffffffFill Level|r stacks and triggers a reduced cooldown based on stacks consumed.

Ancestor's Call.name: Ancestor's Call
Ancestor's Call.description:
Teaches you Ancestor's Call.Ancestor's Call (Troll)Call an Honored Ancestor to aid you in battle until dismissed that scales with your Agility and attack power.

Whenever you use Barbaric Whirl or Whirling Advance, your Honored Ancestor mimics it.

Ancestor's Fury.name: Ancestor's Fury
Ancestor's Fury.description: Unbridled Rage now also increases your Frost damage by 10%.

Ancestral Combat.name: Ancestral Combat
Ancestral Combat.description:
Empower yourself, granting your Physical damage dealt a 25% chance to trigger an additional main hand attack as Frost damage on your target and grant a stack of Fill Level.

Lasts until triggered 20 times.

Ancestral Fury.name: Ancestral Fury
Ancestral Fury.description:
Emanate a powerful aura, granting 10% increased melee and ranged haste to party and raid members within 100 yds.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Ancestral Keg.name: Ancestral Keg
Ancestral Keg.description:
Place a keg on the ground for 30 sec that allies can use to restore their health and mana.

Entering combat or moving while drinking from the keg will end the effect.

Ancestral Roar.name: Ancestral Roar
Ancestral Roar.description:
|cffffffffRequires Enraged|r
Roar with ancestral fervor, healing you for 201.

Ancestral Spirit.name: Ancestral Spirit
Ancestral Spirit.description: Reduces the Energy cost of your Spirit spells and increases the duration of your Shouts by -50%.

Ancestral Strike.name: Ancestral Strike
Ancestral Strike.description: Strike an enemy with the might of your ancestors, dealing 33 damage.

Ancestral Trauma.name: Ancestral Trauma
Ancestral Trauma.description: Damage dealt by Ancestral Strike and Crush now scales with your Strength.

Ancestral Wisdom.name: Ancestral Wisdom
Ancestral Wisdom.description:
Increases chance to hit with all spells and attacks by 1% for you and party and raid members.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Anger Issues.name: Anger Issues
Anger Issues.description: Scoring a critical strike against an enemy now reduces the cooldown of Carnage by -4 sec.

Axe Twirling.name: Axe Twirling
Axe Twirling.description: Display mastery over throwing weapons for 10 seconds, causing Throw Weapon, Gutspiller, and Berserker Axe to strike 2 additional nearby enemies.

Barbaric Rage.name: Barbaric Rage
Barbaric Rage.description: While enraged, the global cooldown of Barbarian abilities is reduced by 30%.

Barbaric Whirl.name: Barbaric Whirl
Barbaric Whirl.description: Whirl in a barbaric fury, striking up to 5 nearby enemies with both weapons, dealing 120% Weapon Damage plus 3.

Barbed Spear.name: Barbed Spear
Barbed Spear.description:
Throw a heavy spear with precision at an enemy, dealing 160% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 71, and reducing their healing received by 30% for 10 sec.

@ext:Shares a cooldown with other |cffffffffSpears|r.:ext@

Battering Ram.name: Battering Ram
Battering Ram.description: Increases your Armor penetration by 10% while wielding a two-handed mace or axe.

Battle Rhythm.name: Battle Rhythm
Battle Rhythm.description: Critical strikes with abilities now generate 5 Energy.

Battle Vigor.name: Battle Vigor
Battle Vigor.description:
|cffec8201Enrage Effect|r
Enrage for 15 sec, gaining 40% increased maximum health. After the effect expires, the health is lost.

Beheader.name: Beheader
Beheader.description: Scoring a kill blow with Decapitate now refunds 100% of your maximum Energy.

Bellowing Voice.name: Bellowing Voice
Bellowing Voice.description: Increases the effectiveness of your Shouts by 20%.

Berserker.name: Berserker
Berserker.description:
While enraged, your ranged critical strikes now grant you Berserker. Once applied it cannot be applied again.BerserkerYour ranged abilities have a 20% chance to unleash Berserker Throw, dealing 75% Ranged Weapon Damage. Lasts 15 seconds.

While active, every offensive ranged ability used increases its chance to trigger by 2%.

Berserker Aura.name: Berserker Aura
Berserker Aura.description: Go berserk, increasing your attack power by 5% and increasing the Frost Resistance of all party and raid members by 60. Does not stack with similar effects.

Berserker Axe.name: Berserker Axe
Berserker Axe.description:
|cffffffffRequires Enraged|r
|cffffffff3 Charges, 8 sec recharge|r
Hurl two axes at an enemy, each dealing 27 Physical damage and reducing their armor by 4% for 20 sec, stacking up to 5 times.

Berserker Rush.name: Berserker Rush
Berserker Rush.description: Charge an enemy dealing 64 Physical damage and rooting them for 2 sec, then leap backwards.

Blind Stupor.name: Blind Stupor
Blind Stupor.description: Damage dealt by Keg Smash now reduces enemies' casting speed by -30% for 15 seconds.

Blood and Glory.name: Blood and Glory
Blood and Glory.description: While at or below 35% maximum health, you now gain 20% increased healing received and take -10% reduced damage.

Bloodbound.name: Bloodbound
Bloodbound.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Warband by -30 sec and Ancestral Roar by -5 sec.

Bloodthirsty.name: Bloodthirsty
Bloodthirsty.description: Increases the effectiveness of your Outrage by 100%.

Bloody Fighter.name: Bloody Fighter
Bloody Fighter.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Brutal Swing and Smash by 5%.

Bloody Onslaught.name: Bloody Onslaught
Bloody Onslaught.description: Increases the duration of Onslaught by 6 sec.

Body Builder.name: Body Builder
Body Builder.description:
Level 50 Passive
You now gain 1 Strength for every 3 Agility and your size is increased by 5%.

Born Killer.name: Born Killer
Born Killer.description: Killing an enemy that yields experience or honor now grants you 5% increased armor penetration and movement speed for 5 seconds, stacking 20 times.

Break.name: Break
Break.description: Break an enemy's defenses, reducing their armor by 4% for 20 sec, stacking 5 times.

Breaking Morale.name: Breaking Morale
Breaking Morale.description: Reduces the Energy cost of Break by -15.

Breath of The North.name: Breath of The North
Breath of The North.description:
Unleashes a frost breath, dealing 46 Frost damage to enemies in a 12 yd cone and slowing them by 30% for 5 sec.

Can only be used after emptying your |cffffffffTankard|r.

Brutal Form.name: Brutal Form
Brutal Form.description: Increases the tick rate of Born in Blood by -25%, allows its healing to scale with your Agility, and it can now critically heal you.

Brutal Shout.name: Brutal Shout
Brutal Shout.description: Roar with barbaric fury, increasing the Agilty of nearby party and raid members by 4 for 30 min.

Brutal Spirit.name: Brutal Spirit
Brutal Spirit.description: Increases the effectiveness of your Spirit spells by 25%.

Brutal Swing.name: Brutal Swing
Brutal Swing.description: Your next attack causes you to swing violently at an enemy and up to 2 nearby enemies, dealing 120% Weapon Damage plus 17.

Carnage.name: Carnage
Carnage.description: You prepare yourself to dominate your foes, reducing your Energy costs by 50% and causing killing enemies that yield experience or honor to grant you |cffffffffBorn in Blood|r.@s:560521:0@ Lasts for 30 sec.

Cheers!.name: Cheers!
Cheers!.description:
Designate an ally as your drinking partner for 30 minutes, reducing all damage they take by -5%, and causing 10% of all damage they take to be redirected to you.

You can only have 1 ally designated at a time.

Clanlord's Totem.name: Clanlord's Totem
Clanlord's Totem.description:
Drop the Clanlord's Totem at the target location where it will remain for 15 seconds.

The totem emanates an aura for 15 seconds, causing allied players within 100 yds to deal 35% AP additional damage as Frost damage when they deal direct damage and gain 50% increased honor.

Applies Exhaustion, preventing you from benefiting from similar effects for 1 minute.

Cold Brew.name: Cold Brew
Cold Brew.description:
Critical strikes with Frost damage now generate a stack of Fill Level. 

Can only occur once per sec.

Crush.name: Crush
Crush.description: Crush enemies in a frontal cone, dealing 250% Weapon Damage plus 90, knocking them down briefly and stunning them for 3 sec.

Crusher.name: Crusher
Crusher.description: Melee auto attacks now have a 10% chance to reset the cooldown of Crush.

Crystal Enhancements.name: Crystal Enhancements
Crystal Enhancements.description:
You now emanate an aura around you, increasing the Armor of party and raid members by 390.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Dauntless.name: Dauntless
Dauntless.description: Dealing damage with Whirling Advance now dispels 1 movement slowing effect from you and refunds 2 Energy.

Decapitate.name: Decapitate
Decapitate.description:
Attempt to decapitate an injured enemy, dealing 200% Weapon Damage plus 72, and converting each extra point of Energy to deal additional damage (up to a maximum cost of 100 Energy).

Only usable on enemies below 35% health.

Deep Fury.name: Deep Fury
Deep Fury.description: Direct Physical damage dealt now reduces the cooldown of Unbridled Rage by -1 sec.

Defiance.name: Defiance
Defiance.description: Attempt to defy death, reducing all damage taken by 30% to 80% based on your current missing health for 15 seconds.

Drinking Frenzy.name: Drinking Frenzy
Drinking Frenzy.description:
Your melee attacks now have a 15% chance to grant a stack of Fill Level.

In addition, your chance to hit is increased by 5%.

Drunken Brawler.name: Drunken Brawler
Drunken Brawler.description: Taking direct damage now increases your chance to dodge by 1% for 3 seconds, stacking 10 times.

Drunken Frenzy.name: Drunken Frenzy
Drunken Frenzy.description: Unbridled Rage now increases your Honored Ancestor's Physical damage by 15% for 10 seconds.

Efficient Killer.name: Efficient Killer
Efficient Killer.description: Reduces the Energy cost of your spells and abilities by -10%.

Enduring Shout.name: Enduring Shout
Enduring Shout.description: Roar with enduring fury, increasing the Stamina of nearby allies by 20 for 30 min.

Entrails.name: Entrails
Entrails.description: Damage dealt by bleed effects now increases your Agility by 1% for 8 seconds, stacking 10 times.

Excessive Power.name: Excessive Power
Excessive Power.description:
Level 10 Passive
Increases your maximum Energy by 100%.

Face Smasher.name: Face Smasher
Face Smasher.description: Your ability critical strikes now reduce the cooldown of your Battle Vigor and Thick Skull by -1 sec.

Fill Level.name: Fill Level
Fill Level.description:
Level 10 Passive
Grants you Fill Level and the ability to manipulate a Tankard.Fill LevelYou have a magical Tankard that fills up over time, granting you 1 stack of Fill Level every 2 sec.

Some of your other abilities empty your Tankard to trigger with a reduced cooldown.

First Blood.name: First Blood
First Blood.description: Increases all damage dealt to enemies above 80% health by 20%.

Forward Advance.name: Forward Advance
Forward Advance.description: Increases the range of your Whirling Advance by 3 yds.

Frost Giant's Fury.name: Frost Giant's Fury
Frost Giant's Fury.description: Casting Breath of the North now grants you 10% melee attack speed, plus an additional 20% when using a two-handed weapon, for 8 seconds.

Frostbite.name: Frostbite
Frostbite.description: Breath of The North now causes the target to bleed for an additional 30% of its damage over 6 seconds as Frost damage.

Frothing Savage.name: Frothing Savage
Frothing Savage.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Spears and Berserker Axe by 8% against bleeding targets.

Frozen Blades.name: Frozen Blades
Frozen Blades.description:
Critical strikes now grant party and raid members 5% critical strike chance for 8 seconds.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Frozen Tankard.name: Frozen Tankard
Frozen Tankard.description:
Throw one of your extra tankards at an enemy, dealing 156 Frost damage and stunning them for 4 sec. 

Stunned enemies are considered |cff3399ffFrozen|r.

Frozen Warlord.name: Frozen Warlord
Frozen Warlord.description: Damage dealt by Hodir's Wrath now freezes enemies in place for 0 seconds.

Furious Berserker.name: Furious Berserker
Furious Berserker.description: Critical strikes with Barbed Spear now grants Born in Blood.Born in BloodBattle fuels your vitality, restoring 18 health and 12 Energy over 3 seconds.

Fury of the North.name: Fury of the North
Fury of the North.description: Increases the duration of the enrage effect from your Ramhorn Rage by 6 sec and causes it to increase your movement speed by 40% for its duration.

Giant Tosser.name: Giant Tosser
Giant Tosser.description: Your Headhunter's Spear now generates 50% additional Energy when you strike an enemy that is at least 20 yds away.

Grisly Meal.name: Grisly Meal
Grisly Meal.description:
After you kill an enemy that yields experience or honor, you can use this ability to consume its meat, regaining 30% of your health over 10 sec.

Not usable in combat.

Gruesome.name: Gruesome
Gruesome.description: Increases the damage of Throw Weapon, Gutspiller, and Guts Spilled by 10%.

Gurubashi Technique.name: Gurubashi Technique
Gurubashi Technique.description:
Casting Throw Weapon now has a 25% chance to transform your next cast of it within 8 seconds into Rapid Throw.Rapid ThrowThrow your ranged weapon 3 times in quick succession, each dealing 50% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 25 Physical damage. 

Grants Born in Blood. Scales with damage modifiers to Throw Weapon.

Guts Splatter.name: Guts Splatter
Guts Splatter.description: Your Gutspiller now allows your abilities to ignore 10% of the enemy's Armor.

Gutspiller.name: Gutspiller
Gutspiller.description:
Launch a heavy axe at an enemy, causing them to bleed for 198 damage over 12 sec.

Every 6 sec the target has their |cffffffffGuts Spilled|r, causing them to bleed out for an additional 194 damage.

Hail of Hammers.name: Hail of Hammers
Hail of Hammers.description: Reduces the cast time of Crush by -25%.

Headbutt.name: Headbutt
Headbutt.description: Savagely headbutt an enemy, dealing 56 Physical damage, knocking them down briefly and stunning them for 4 sec.

Headhunter.name: Headhunter
Headhunter.description:
Level 10 Passive
Reduces the Energy cost of Throw Weapon, Maiming Spear, and Whirling Advance by -15.

Headhunter's Spear.name: Headhunter's Spear
Headhunter's Spear.description:
Hurl a light spear at an enemy dealing 140% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 43 and restores 30% of your maximum Energy.

@ext:Shares a cooldown with other |cffffffffSpears|r.:ext@

Headhunting.name: Headhunting
Headhunting.description: Reduces the cast time of Throw Weapon by -20% and removes your spell pushback suffered from taking damage.

Headlopper.name: Headlopper
Headlopper.description: Your critical strikes with Decapitate now cause the enemy to bleed, dealing an additional 30% of the damage dealt over 5 seconds.

Hodir's Revenge.name: Hodir's Revenge
Hodir's Revenge.description: Enemies damaged by your Frozen Tankard now take 50% increased damage from you for 6 seconds.

Hodir's Wrath.name: Hodir's Wrath
Hodir's Wrath.description: Erupt with the power of Hodir, dealing 1361 + 120% AP Frost damage to nearby enemies and restoring 100% of your maximum Energy.

Horde Breaker.name: Horde Breaker
Horde Breaker.description: Your Crush is now guaranteed to critically strike enemies affected by Headbutt and it now applies Wounded to enemies for 10 seconds.Wounded (Proc)Increases Physical Damage taken by 4% for 10 seconds.

Hunting for Sport.name: Hunting for Sport
Hunting for Sport.description: While Unbridled Rage is active, your attacks now ignore 20% of the target's Armor.

Ice Cold Bubbles.name: Ice Cold Bubbles
Ice Cold Bubbles.description: Each Fill Level stack now also increases Frost damage dealt by 2%.

Icebound Ancestry.name: Icebound Ancestry
Icebound Ancestry.description:
Increases the critical strike chance of Breath of the North by 10%.

In addition, your attacks now ignore Armor against Frozen targets.

Impaling Spear.name: Impaling Spear

Improved Ancestral Combat.name: Improved Ancestral Combat
Improved Ancestral Combat.description: Reduces the Energy cost of your Ancestral Combat by -10 and allows it to trigger 3 additional times.

Incredibly Strong.name: Incredibly Strong
Incredibly Strong.description: Removes the minimum range from Maiming Spear, but reduces its maximum range by -5 yds.

Iron Gut.name: Iron Gut
Iron Gut.description: Reduces the duration of poison effects on you by -40%.

Jawbreaker.name: Jawbreaker
Jawbreaker.description: Attempt to break an enemy's jaw, interrupting them and preventing any spell from that school from being cast for 4 seconds.

Keg Smash.name: Keg Smash
Keg Smash.description: Smash an enemy for 35 Physical damage, plus an additional 28 Frost damage to up to 5 nearby enemies.

Killing Spree.name: Killing Spree
Killing Spree.description:
Charge at an enemy, dealing 55 Physical damage.

Can only be used within 6 sec of scoring a killing blow or applying |cffffffffBorn in Blood|r.

Knockout Artist.name: Knockout Artist
Knockout Artist.description: Successfully interrupting a target with Jawbreaker now increases your haste by 30% for 4 seconds and refunds half its Energy cost.

Legacy of the Amani.name: Legacy of the Amani
Legacy of the Amani.description: Damage dealt by your Spears now has a 25% chance to cause you to quickly throw an additional spear that strikes for 40% of the damage dealt.

Liquid Courage.name: Liquid Courage
Liquid Courage.description: Each Fill Level stack now reduces your damage taken by -2%.

Maiming Spear.name: Maiming Spear
Maiming Spear.description:
Throw your ranged weapon at your enemy's legs, dealing 103 Physical damage and slowing their movement speed by 50% for 10 sec.

@ext:Shares a cooldown with other |cffffffffSpears|R.:ext@

Mak'Gora.name: Mak'Gora
Mak'Gora.description: Critical strikes on enemies above 80% or below 20% health now challenges them to a Mak'Gora. Only 1 enemy can be challenged at a time.Mak'gora (20%)Challenge an enemy to a duel to the death for 10 seconds, reducing their healing received by -20% and absorbing the next 1244 + 100% AP healing done to them.

Manhunter.name: Manhunter
Manhunter.description:
Increases critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 3%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, increases your damage dealt by 10% against Humanoids.

Maximum Carnage.name: Maximum Carnage
Maximum Carnage.description: Casting Unbridled Rage now causes you to begin swinging your weapon around you dealing 47 + 25% AP Physical damage to up to 5 nearby enemies over 5 seconds.

Might of Utgarde.name: Might of Utgarde
Might of Utgarde.description: Attacks from your Ancestral Combat now heal your Honored Ancestor for 5% maximum health and cause it to perform an Ancestral Whirl attack.

Mounting Fury.name: Mounting Fury
Mounting Fury.description: Increases the duration of Born in Blood by 2 sec.

No Survivors.name: No Survivors
No Survivors.description: Increases the duration of Axe Twirling, Maiming Spear, and Barbed Spear by 5 sec.

Ogre's Strength.name: Ogre's Strength
Ogre's Strength.description:
Level 40 Passive
Increases your attack power by 30% of your Strength.

One With The Ancestors.name: One With The Ancestors
One With The Ancestors.description: Increases your critical strike chance by 2%.

Onslaught.name: Onslaught
Onslaught.description:
|cffec8201Enrage Effect|r
Become enraged, instantly generating 25 Energy plus an additional 20 Energy every 2 sec for 10 sec.

Outrage.name: Outrage
Outrage.description:
Requires Enraged
Increases your haste and critical strike chance by 20%, but increases your damage taken by 30% for 10 seconds. 

Physical critical strikes extend this effect by 1 sec.

Overkill.name: Overkill
Overkill.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Decapitate and Headhunter's Spear by 30% against targets below 20% health.

Payback.name: Payback
Payback.description: Increases the damage dealt by your Guts Spilled by 75%.

Plugging the Hole.name: Plugging the Hole
Plugging the Hole.description: Your Skull Smash now removes all bleed effects on the enemy.

Power Swings.name: Power Swings
Power Swings.description: Reduces the cooldown of Crush by -5 sec.

Power Tosser.name: Power Tosser
Power Tosser.description:
Level 50 Passive
Damage dealt by Throw Weapon now scales with your Agility.

Powerful Grip.name: Powerful Grip
Powerful Grip.description: Reduces the duration of disarm effects by -30%.

Puncture Wounds.name: Puncture Wounds
Puncture Wounds.description: Critical strikes with Spears now causes enemies to bleed for 633 + 16.5% ranged AP over 6 seconds.

Pure Power.name: Pure Power
Pure Power.description: Increases the damage of Smash by 15% and your expertise by 5.

Rage Whirling.name: Rage Whirling
Rage Whirling.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Whirling Advance by 50%.

Rage of the North.name: Rage of the North
Rage of the North.description: Increases the amount of attacks that can trigger your Ale of The God-King by 10.

Raging Spirit.name: Raging Spirit
Raging Spirit.description: Casting Unbridled Rage now grants you 30 Energy and it now also removes the Energy cost of your Spirit spells while active.

Rally Behind Me!.name: Rally Behind Me!
Rally Behind Me!.description:
Increases the duration of Warband by 3 sec.

In addition, your first use of Warband will incur no cooldown. Can only occur once every 1.5 min.

Rancor.name: Rancor
Rancor.description: Your Brutal Swing now triggers an additional auto attack on the primary target.

Rapid Recovery.name: Rapid Recovery
Rapid Recovery.description: Your Onslaught's effect now occurs -50% faster.

Reckful.name: Reckful
Reckful.description: Your Smash now has a 30% chance to not trigger a cooldown.

Reckless Movements.name: Reckless Movements
Reckless Movements.description: Increases the damage of Ancestral Strike and Barbaric Whirl by 20%.

Relentless.name: Relentless
Relentless.description:
Level 20 Passive
Critical strikes with Ancestral Strike and Brutal Swing now refund 10 Energy.

Savage.name: Savage
Savage.description: Unbridled Rage now also increases your critical damage by 10%.

Savage Cadence.name: Savage Cadence
Savage Cadence.description:
Direct critical strikes now extend the duration of your Unbridled Rage by 0.5 sec. This effect can occur only once per sec.

Killing blows extend the duration of your Unbridled Rage by 0.5 sec.

Savagery.name: Savagery
Savagery.description:
While below 35% health, your auto attacks, Ancestral Strike, and Throw Weapon now grant Born in Blood. Can only occur once every 2 sec.
Born in BloodBattle fuels your vitality, restoring 18 health and 12 Energy over 3 seconds.

Sen'jin's Guidance.name: Sen'jin's Guidance
Sen'jin's Guidance.description:
Transforms your Throw Weapon into Javelin Toss and increases the critical strike chance of Javelin Toss by 5%.Javelin TossTake aim and hurl a javelin at an enemy dealing 160% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 241. 

Scales with damage modifiers to Throw Weapon and Spears. Usable while moving.

Skull Smash.name: Skull Smash
Skull Smash.description:
Pick up a rock and hurl it at an enemy's skull, disorienting them for 40 seconds (8 sec vs players). 

Damage taken will end this effect.

Skullseeker.name: Skullseeker
Skullseeker.description: Increases your critical strike chance against enemies above 80% health by 25%.

Smash.name: Smash
Smash.description:
|cffffffffRequires Enraged|r
Smash an enemy with both weapons for 135% Weapon Damage plus 8.

Smash Lock.name: Smash Lock
Smash Lock.description: Target a locked chest or item to smash them open!

Smasher.name: Smasher
Smasher.description: Removes the Energy cost from Skull Smash.

Spear Shards.name: Spear Shards
Spear Shards.description: Whenever you shatter your Impaling Spear, affected enemies bleed for 100% of the damage dealt over 3 seconds.

Spear Thrower.name: Spear Thrower
Spear Thrower.description:
Level 30 Passive
Casting Throw Weapon now has a 30% chance to reset the cooldown of your Spears.

Spiked Weapons.name: Spiked Weapons
Spiked Weapons.description: Increases the critical damage of Crush, Brutal Swing, and Decapitate by 20%.

Spirit of Bloodshed.name: Spirit of Bloodshed
Spirit of Bloodshed.description:
The scent of blood fills nearby enemies with dread, increasing their Physical damage taken while below 35% health by 10% and causes your killing blows to grant you |cffffffffBorn in Blood|r.@s:560521:0@

@ext: You may only have 1 |cffffffffSpirit|r spell active at a time.:ext@

Spirit of Conflict.name: Spirit of Conflict
Spirit of Conflict.description:
Your spirit feeds on the clash of combat, increasing the resource costs of nearby enemies by 15% and giving direct damage taken a chance to restore 10 Energy.

@ext: You may only have 1 |cffffffffSpirit|r spell active at a time.:ext@

Spirit of Savagery.name: Spirit of Savagery
Spirit of Savagery.description:
Your brutal fighting spirit weakens nearby enemies, reducing their attack power by 32.

@ext: You may only have 1 |cffffffffSpirit|r spell active at a time.:ext@

Spirit of War.name: Spirit of War
Spirit of War.description:
Your battle presence shakes the resolve of nearby enemies, reducing their spell critical strike chance by 10% and increasing their spell pushback from casting by 20%.

@ext: You may only have 1 |cffffffffSpirit|r spell active at a time.:ext@

Spirit of the Hunt.name: Spirit of the Hunt
Spirit of the Hunt.description:
Your hunting instincts unsettle nearby enemies, reducing their movement speed by 20% and allowing them to be seen even when stealthed or invisible.

@ext: You may only have 1 |cffffffffSpirit|r spell active at a time.:ext@

Spite.name: Spite
Spite.description: Quickly unleash 3 Berserker Throws at your target and then fling yourself back a great distance, dealing 125% Ranged Weapon Damage, scaling with modifiers to Berserker Axe.

Splash Zone.name: Splash Zone
Splash Zone.description:
Share a drink from your |cffffffffTankard|r with all party and raid members, granting 110 increased attack or spell power for 15 sec.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Steel Fury.name: Steel Fury
Steel Fury.description:
Dealing damage with Storm of Steel increases the damage of its subsequent strikes by 4%, stacking 10 times.

In addition, the duration of Storm of Steel is increased by 2.5 sec.

Steelslinger.name: Steelslinger
Steelslinger.description: Reduces the cooldown of Barbaric Whirl by -2 sec and increases its damage dealt by 100% on enemies below 35% health.

Storm of Steel.name: Storm of Steel
Storm of Steel.description: Begin striking your target every 1 sec for 80% Weapon Damage for 3 seconds.

Strength of Goria.name: Strength of Goria
Strength of Goria.description: Casting Unbridled Rage now grants you Born in Blood.Born in BloodBattle fuels your vitality, restoring 18 health and 12 Energy over 3 seconds.

Strong Arm.name: Strong Arm
Strong Arm.description: Increases the damage of Spears by 15% and your hit chance by 3%.

Sustaining Swings.name: Sustaining Swings
Sustaining Swings.description: Melee attacks now have an 8% chance to heal you for 10% of the damage dealt and cause your next Ancestral Strike to deal 50% increased damage.

Symbol of the Warspear.name: Symbol of the Warspear
Symbol of the Warspear.description:
You are marked by the Warspear symbol, granting 10% increased attack power to party and raid members. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, reduces the cooldown of Spears by -2 sec.

Tavern Brawl!.name: Tavern Brawl!
Tavern Brawl!.description:
Enrage all nearby allies, increasing their haste by 30% for 20 seconds.

After being affected by this spell, allies cannot benefit from similar effects for 5 minutes.

Thane's Grip.name: Thane's Grip
Thane's Grip.description: Allows you to wield a Two-Handed Axe, Mace, or Sword in each hand, but reduces your Physical Damage dealt by -8%.

Thane's Guard.name: Thane's Guard
Thane's Guard.description: Gain the Shield proficiency and while wearing a shield you gain 40% increased attack speed and 100% increased Armor contribution from your shield.

The Finest Ale.name: The Finest Ale
The Finest Ale.description: Your Ale of The God-King no longer empties your Tankard.

The Spins.name: The Spins
The Spins.description: Casting Keg Smash now causes your Honored Ancestor to perform an Ancestral Whirl attack upon nearby enemies.

Thick Skull.name: Thick Skull
Thick Skull.description:
Your thick skull makes you immune to all stun effects for 10 seconds and while active taking direct damage grants you Born in Blood.

Usable while stunned.Born in BloodBattle fuels your vitality, restoring 18 health and 12 Energy over 3 seconds.

Thirst for Battle.name: Thirst for Battle
Thirst for Battle.description: Your Smash now regenerate 25% of your maximum Energy.

Throw Weapon.name: Throw Weapon
Throw Weapon.description:
Throw your ranged weapon at an enemy dealing 125% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 21 Physical damage.

Usable while moving.

Time To Kill!.name: Time To Kill!
Time To Kill!.description: Reduces the cooldown of Axe Twirling by -15 sec.

To The Bone.name: To The Bone
To The Bone.description: Damage dealt by Breath of the North now reduces enemies' resistances by 75 and increases their Magic damage taken by -2% for 8 seconds.

Trip to the Alehouse.name: Trip to the Alehouse
Trip to the Alehouse.description: Increases the damage of Keg Smash by 10% and its range by 3 yds.

Unbridled Rage.name: Unbridled Rage
Unbridled Rage.description:
|cffec8201Enrage Effect|r
Become enraged, increasing your Physical damage by 10% for 8 sec.

Unified Rage.name: Unified Rage
Unified Rage.description: Your Unbridled Rage now increases your chance to trigger Ancestral Combat by 25%.

Uniting Voice.name: Uniting Voice
Uniting Voice.description:
Casting Ancestral Roar now increases haste of party and raid members by 5% for 20 seconds.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Critical strikes extend the duration of the buff by 1 sec.

Unrelenting.name: Unrelenting
Unrelenting.description: Increases your Physical damage dealt and taken by 5%.

Unstoppable Rage.name: Unstoppable Rage
Unstoppable Rage.description: Increases the duration of Unbridled Rage by 2 sec.

Utter Devastation.name: Utter Devastation
Utter Devastation.description:
Increases the duration of Maximum Carnage by 1 sec and it now grants Utter Devastation for 6 seconds. Utter DevastationInstantly removes all movement impairing effects, increases your movement speed by 25%, and makes you immune to slows.

Can be consumed by Decapitate or Crush to guarantee them to critically strike.

Vengeance For Zul'jin.name: Vengeance For Zul'jin
Vengeance For Zul'jin.description: Casting Berserker Rush now grants you Born in Blood.Born in BloodBattle fuels your vitality, restoring 18 health and 12 Energy over 3 seconds.

Vital Spirit.name: Vital Spirit
Vital Spirit.description: Increases the range of your Spirit spells by 10 yds.

War Cry.name: War Cry
War Cry.description:
Unleash a blood curdling war cry, increasing melee and ranged attack speed by 20%, and attack power by 150 of allies within 25 yds for 20 seconds.

Allies cannot benefit from this spell again for 5 minutes.

War Tales.name: War Tales
War Tales.description: Increases your chance to resist fear and horrify effects by 25%.

Warband.name: Warband
Warband.description: Bring all nearby allies into the warband for 12 seconds, granting them Born in Blood, repeating every 3 sec.Born in BloodBattle fuels your vitality, restoring 18 health and 12 Energy over 3 seconds.

Whirling Advance.name: Whirling Advance
Whirling Advance.description:
Whirl forward, dealing 14 Physical damage to enemies in your way.

Not usable while rooted.

Whirling Assault.name: Whirling Assault
Whirling Assault.description: Increases the damage of Whirling Advance by 300% on enemies above 80% health.

You Want Axe?.name: You Want Axe?
You Want Axe?.description: While enraged, casting Spears now refreshes 3 charges of Berserker Axe and your next 3 casts cost -50% less Energy. Lasts 12 seconds.
